Name: Register Listening Worker with Octopus
Description: Step template to Register an Listening Worker with Octopus Deploy using the API.  Useful for when you need to wait to install additional software and a restart when spinning up a new worker.
Author: octobob

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningWorker.Octopus.Base.Url
Parameters.Label: Octopus Base Url
Parameters.HelpText: The base url of your Octopus Deploy instance.  Example: https://samples.octopus.app

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningWorker.Octopus.Api.Key
Parameters.Label: Octopus Api Key
Parameters.HelpText: The API key of a user in Octopus Deploy who has permissions to register the cluster.

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningWorker.Machine.Name
Parameters.Label: Machine Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the machine to register with Octopus Deploy.

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningWorker.Machine.Address
Parameters.Label: Machine Address
Parameters.HelpText: The machine address (IP Address or Domain Name) to connect to

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningWorker.Machine.Port
Parameters.Label: Port Number
Parameters.HelpText: The port the tentacle is listening on

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningWorker.WorkerPool.List
Parameters.Label: Worker Pool CSV List
Parameters.HelpText: Comma separated list of Worker Pools to assign the worker to in Octopus Deploy.  This can be the worker pool name or the id.

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningWorker.MachinePolicy.IdOrName
Parameters.Label: Machine Policy Id Or Name
Parameters.HelpText: Enter in the name or the Id of the Machine Policy in Octopus Deploy for the AKS Cluster.

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningWorker.Overwrite.Existing
Parameters.Label: Overwrite Existing Registration
Parameters.HelpText: Indicates if the existing worker should be overwritten
